news.title: Despite ‘misgivings,’ judge approves Elon Musk’s $1.5M SEC settlement
news.summary: The saga of Musk's tussle with the SEC over how he disclosed his growing stake in Twitter (now X) has come to an end.

news.title: Lovable reportedly in talks to double its valuation to $13.2B
news.summary: The $300 million round is expected to be led by Menlo Ventures, Sifted reported.

news.title: Feds demand autonomous vehicle companies stop interfering with first responders
news.summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said emergency scenes are not "edge cases."

news.title: Google’s deepfake detector system used to debunk McConnell hoax pic
news.summary: Earlier this week, a picture seemed to show Kentucky Senator Mitch McConnell covered in tubes in a hospital bed in a state of extreme distress. It turned out to be an AI-generated fake.

news.title: With EU backing, QuantumDiamonds aims to speed up chip manufacturing
news.summary: Like its U.S. counterpart, the European Chips Act aims to foster the semiconductor industry — in part thanks to state subsidies. One of the beneficiaries is QuantumDiamonds, a German startup that applies a novel approach to inspecting chips.

news.title: Meta is reportedly working on smart glasses that would be recording all the time
news.summary: Meta might be the next company to make an always-on AI wearable. The company is working on prototype "super sensing" always-aware smart glasses that could continuously record audio and snap photos "every few seconds," according to the Financial Times. news.title: Microsoft’s Xbox reset is pivoting Obsidian to make Fallout instead of Avowed
news.summary: As part of Microsoft's big Xbox "reset," which includes layoffs affecting 3,200 staffers, jettisoning studios, and shifting investments to focus on "higher priority projects," Obsidian Entertainment is changing its plans. news.title: One of Meta’s Offices Was Briefly Overtaken by a Rogue Squirrel

news.title: Messi and Ronaldo Are Building Tech Portfolios. Mo Salah Is Playing a Different Game
news.summary: Lionel Messi and Cristiano Ronaldo are betting on AI, health tech, and startups. Mohamed Salah is taking a more traditional route beyond football.

news.title: The FTC Settlement With John Deere Is a Huge Win for the Right-to-Repair Movement
news.summary: After more than a decade of pushback, farmers and repair advocates have won access to equipment and services John Deere had long kept under its control.

news.title: I Built a Self-Improving AI, and So Can You
news.summary: Experiments in using AI to build AI show that the future doesn’t just belong to the frontier labs.

news.title: Peter Thiel’s Husband Sued a Flight Attendant Who Says He Assaulted Her on a Private Jet
news.summary: Matthew Danzeisen’s lawyer says the case is a “shakedown about a bag” that brushed someone’s leg. Stefanie Bojar says she was injured aboard the jet—and that the lawsuit is a bullying tactic.
